page.title: License management
page.subtitle: License for this API instance (deployment). Do not confuse with the tenant license badge in the header.
page.subtitleWithMandant: Manage your tenant license and view the server (on-premise) license. Tenant license applies to your company; server license applies to this API instance.

server.title: Server license status
server.subtitle: This license applies to the entire server and all tenants.

tenant.title: All tenant licenses
tenant.subtitle: Overview of all license sales and statuses

superAdmin.subtitle: Overview of all tenant (SaaS) licenses. Edit key and validity per tenant.

editModal.title: Edit tenant license
editModal.licenseKeyTooltip: REGK tenant key (optional). Without a key the trial period remains active.
editModal.addHint: A validity date is required. The license key is optional.

extendModal.title: Extend tenant license
extendModal.infoText: The validity period is determined by the license key.
extendModal.previewError: The license key is invalid. Please check your input.
extendModal.previewErrorExpired: This license key has already expired.
extendModal.previewErrorWrongTenant: This license key is not valid for this tenant.

tenant.active: The tenant license is active. Write access, user management, and general access are enabled.
tenant.graceWrite: The tenant license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Writing is still allowed, but renewal is now due.
tenant.graceReadonly: The tenant license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Write operations are blocked, while read access and user management remain available.
tenant.lockdown: The tenant license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. The tenant is now in lockdown.
tenant.expired: The tenant license expired {{days}} day(s) ago.
tenant.noLicense: No license is stored for this tenant.

deployment.active: The deployment license is active. Write access and general access are enabled.
deployment.graceWrite: The deployment license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Write operations are still allowed, but renewal is now due.
deployment.graceReadonly: The deployment license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. The deployment is now in read-only mode.
deployment.lockdown: The deployment license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. The deployment is now in lockdown.
deployment.expired: The deployment license expired {{days}} day(s) ago.
deployment.noLicense: No license is stored for this deployment.

badge.unavailableTooltip: Could not load license status (missing permission or server error).

expired.label: EXPIRED
expired.tooltip: License expired — please renew. Payment creation may be blocked.

demo.label: DEMO
demo.tooltip: Demo user account — data may be non-production or limited.

devExport.label: DEV / EXPORT
devExport.tooltip: OpenAPI export mode — no real license setup.

superAdminMode.label: Super Admin mode — full control
superAdminMode.tooltip: Platform administration. Tenant licenses are managed under Tenants; the server deployment license is not shown here.

tenant.baseTooltip: License of the active tenant (company). The admin UI itself has no license restriction.

none.label: No license
none.tooltip: No license expiry is stored for this tenant.

expired.label: Tenant license: EXPIRED
expired.tooltip: The tenant license has expired — please renew.

expired.title: Tenant license expired
expired.message: Your license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. New sales are disabled. You can still review reports and export data.

grace.title: Tenant license expired - grace period
grace.message: Your license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Please renew it within the next {{remaining}} day(s) to keep sales enabled.

graceWrite.title: Tenant license – grace period
graceWrite.adminDescription: Your license expired {{daysExpired}} day(s) ago. You have {{daysRemaining}} day(s) left to renew before the tenant is locked.
graceWrite.contactAdminDescription: The tenant license expired {{daysExpired}} day(s) ago. Please contact your administrator.

lockdown.title: Tenant license expired – system locked
lockdown.adminDescription: Your license expired {{daysExpired}} day(s) ago. The system is now in lockdown mode.
lockdown.contactAdminDescription: This tenant is currently locked. Please contact your administrator.

noLicense.title: Tenant license missing
noLicense.adminDescription: No license is configured for this tenant. Please add a license.

expired.title: Server license expired
expired.message: The server license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Admin write operations are restricted, but reports remain available.

grace.title: Server license expired - grace period
grace.message: The server license expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Please renew it within the next {{remaining}} day(s) before more write operations are disabled.

graceWrite.title: Deployment license – grace period
graceWrite.adminDescription: The deployment license expired {{daysExpired}} day(s) ago. You have {{daysRemaining}} day(s) before write operations are restricted.

lockdown.title: Deployment license expired – system locked
lockdown.adminDescription: The deployment license expired {{daysExpired}} day(s) ago. Only health and license activation endpoints remain available.

noLicense.title: Deployment license missing
noLicense.adminDescription: No license is configured for this deployment.

readOnly.title: License expired - read-only mode
readOnly.message: Your license has expired. You can view data but cannot make changes. Please contact your administrator for renewal.

floatingWarning: Note: The last activation used no offline certificate (JWT). For a floating license, no device fingerprint is required; share the hash only for machine-bound licenses.

activation.title: Activate license
activation.successSimple: License activated successfully. Your system is now fully operational.
activation.failureSimple: License invalid or expired. Please check your license key.
activation.noPermission: No permission to activate (settings manage required).

simpleUi.subtitlePublic: Same essentials as on the POS app.

activationHistory.title: Activation history (API audit)
activationHistory.subtitle: Every activation attempt against this server (success and failure). Enter the full REGK key for key filtering (not the masked list value).
activationHistory.forceDeactivateConfirm: Remove the active device binding in the database and mark this audit row as revoked?

reports.scheduledEmailHint: Optional: scheduled emails via `License:ReportEmail` and `Email:Smtp` (weekly summary; expiry notices at 30/15/7 days). Recipients: `LicenseReportRecipients` or `LicenseReminderRecipients`. JWT is never exported.
reports.dateRangeIssuedAt: Issued date (UTC; filters `issued_at_utc` and activation attempts)
reports.maskLicenseKeys: Mask license keys (recommended; full REGK only for careful backups)
reports.exportLicenseGated: Bulk export requires license features admin_license_manage and admin_rksv.

generation.title: Generate license
generation.expiryDateHelp: Last valid day (interpreted by the server as 23:59 UTC).
generation.requireFingerprintHelp: If enabled, the license is only valid on the specified machine.
generation.unavailable: License generation is not enabled on this server (signing key missing).
generation.noPermission: No permission to generate (settings manage required).
generation.featureNotIncluded: This server's license does not include license management (admin_license_manage). Activate an appropriate license first.
generation.expiryInPast: The expiry date cannot be in the past.
generation.invalidMachineHash: Enter a valid 64-character SHA-256 hex fingerprint.

result.title: Generated license
result.warning: These values are shown only once. Hand them to the customer securely.
result.posDeepLinkHelp: Opens the cash register app with a prefilled activation JWT (cashregister:// scheme). Works only if the app registers this URL scheme.

issued.title: Issued licenses
issued.empty: No licenses issued or no matching rows.
issued.revokeConfirmDescription: The license will be marked as revoked. Clients using this key may stop validating as licensed.
issued.renewExpiryHelp: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD); server uses end-of-day 23:59 UTC. Must be in the future.
issued.renewSuccess: License renewed. New key and JWT are shown.
issued.renewResultWarning: The previous key is revoked. Hand these values to the customer securely.

upgrade.newExpiryHelp: Must be after the stored expiry. Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD); the server uses end of that day at 23:59 UTC.
upgrade.pickAfterExpiry: Please choose a date after the current expiry.
upgrade.resultWarning: Hand these values to the customer securely — they are only shown here.
upgrade.reActivateNotice: The customer must re-activate the POS with the new offline JWT.

super.extendNeedPositive: Enter a positive number of days and/or months.
super.extendResultHelp: The license key stays the same; expiry and JWT were updated.
super.superRevokeBody: SuperAdmin action: the row will be marked revoked (blocked).
super.cancelBody: Terminal cancellation: this row cannot be reactivated.
super.deleteBody: Soft delete: hidden from the list; audit trail remains.
super.unregisterBody: License becomes floating; activations for this key are cleared; a new JWT is issued.
super.fullKeyHint: Full key is only shown in this detail view.

dashboard.sectionSubtitle: Tenant and deployment license metrics, activation trend, and latest events (audit + activations).
dashboard.chartEmpty: No activations in the selected window.
dashboard.loadFailed: Could not load the license dashboard.

supportNotice: Enter your license key. If you need help, contact support@regkasse.at

publicStatus.title: Public license status (API, POS view)
publicStatus.subtitle: Source: GET /api/license/status — same contract as the POS client.
publicStatus.loadError: Could not load public license status.

testPanel.title: License test panel
testPanel.subtitle: Development environment only. Adjust tenant and deployment license expiry for QA scenarios.
testPanel.devOnlyNotice: This panel is available in Development only (Super Admin).
testPanel.productionBlocked: The license test panel is disabled in production.
testPanel.developmentBypassActive: Development-mode license bypass is active — deployment status may be synthetic.
testPanel.overrideHint: Scenarios replace the tenant license immediately (not an extension). “999 days” usually means no expiry date in the DB — after applying, you will see the real remaining days.
testPanel.alertDescription: This panel runs in development only. It is disabled in production.

debug.title: License debug
debug.noticeDescription: Compares mandant license sources (unified GET /api/license/status vs admin detail). Header and dashboard widget use the unified source.
